controls.control_objective: To ensure issue directions to authorised persons through a
controls.control_description: It may be noted that, whenever necessary, Reserve Bank shall issue directions to Authorised Persons through A.P.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to issue directions to authorised persons through a

controls.control_objective: To ensure be up to three years for import of capital goods
controls.control_description: v Period of TC The period of TC, reckoned from the date of shipment, shall be up to three years for import of capital goods.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be up to three years for import of capital goods

controls.control_objective: To ensure be up to one year or the operating cycle whichever is less
controls.control_description: For non-capital goods, this period shall be up to one year or the operating cycle whichever is less.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be up to one year or the operating cycle whichever is less

controls.control_objective: To ensure be the rate prevailing on the date of settlement
controls.control_description: For conversion to Rupee, exchange rate shall be the rate prevailing on the date of settlement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be the rate prevailing on the date of settlement

controls.control_objective: To ensure to follow the guidelines for hedging
controls.control_description: The entities raising TC are required to follow the guidelines for hedging, if any, issued by the concerned sectoral or prudential regulator in respect of foreign currency exposure.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to to follow the guidelines for hedging

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a board approved risk management policy
controls.control_description: Such entities shall have a board approved risk management policy.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to have a board approved risk management policy

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be in compliance with applicable provisions of sez act, 2005 as amended from time to time
controls.control_description: TC transactions in respect of SEZs and DTAs as permitted above should also be in compliance with applicable provisions of SEZ Act, 2005 as amended from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be in compliance with applicable provisions of sez act, 2005 as amended from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure be given by the ads, on behalf of the importer, in favour of overseas lender of tc not exceeding the amount of tc
controls.control_description: Bank guarantees may be given by the ADs, on behalf of the importer, in favour of overseas lender of TC not exceeding the amount of TC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be given by the ads, on behalf of the importer, in favour of overseas lender of tc not exceeding the amount of tc

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be secured by overseas guarantee issued by foreign banks/overseas branches of indian banks
controls.control_description: TC may also be secured by overseas guarantee issued by foreign banks/overseas branches of Indian banks.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be secured by overseas guarantee issued by foreign banks/overseas branches of indian banks

controls.control_objective: To ensure also offer security of movable assets (including financial assets) / immovable assets (excluding land in sezs) / corporate or personal guarantee for r
controls.control_description: For the purpose of raising TC, the importer may also offer security of movable assets (including financial assets) / immovable assets (excluding land in SEZs) / corporate or personal guarantee for raising trade credit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also offer security of movable assets (including financial assets) / immovable assets (excluding land in sezs) / corporate or personal guarantee for r

controls.control_objective: To ensure permit creation of charge on security offered / accept corporate or personal guarantee, duly ensuring that:
controls.control_description: ADs may permit creation of charge on security offered / accept corporate or personal guarantee, duly ensuring that:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to permit creation of charge on security offered / accept corporate or personal guarantee, duly ensuring that:

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed the dues towards trade credit
controls.control_description: In case of invocation, the total payments towards guarantee should not exceed the dues towards trade credit;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed the dues towards trade credit

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as per the provisions contained in foreign exchange management (acquisition and transfer of immovable property in india) regulations, 2018 and fore
controls.control_description: Creation/ enforcement / invocation of charge shall be as per the provisions contained in Foreign Exchange Management (Acquisition and Transfer of Immovable Property in India) Regulations, 2018 and Foreign Exchange Management (Transfer or Issue of Security by a Person Resident Outside India) Regulations, 2017, as amended from time to time, or any other relative Regulations framed under the Foreign Exchange Management Act, 1999 and should also comply with applicable FDI/FII/SEZ policy/ rules/ guidelines.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as per the provisions contained in foreign exchange management (acquisition and transfer of immovable property in india) regulations, 2018 and fore

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into force from the date of publication, in the official gazette, of the relative regulations issued under fema
controls.control_description: Note: The directions on issuance of corporate or personal guarantee mentioned under this provision shall come into force from the date of publication, in the Official Gazette, of the relative Regulations issued under FEMA.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into force from the date of publication, in the official gazette, of the relative regulations issued under fema

controls.control_objective: To ensure to furnish details of tcs like drawal, utilisation, and repayment of tc approved by all its branches, in a consolidated statement, during a month, in
controls.control_description: Monthly reporting: AD Category I banks are required to furnish details of TCs like drawal, utilisation, and repayment of TC approved by all its branches, in a consolidated statement, during a month, in Form TC to the Director, Division of International Trade and Finance, Department of Economic Policy and Research, RBI, Central Office, Fort, Mumbai - 400 001 (and in MS-Excel file through email) so as to reach not later than 10th of the following month.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to to furnish details of tcs like drawal, utilisation, and repayment of tc approved by all its branches, in a consolidated statement, during a month, in

controls.control_objective: To ensure be given a unique identification number by the ad bank
controls.control_description: Each TC may be given a unique identification number by the AD bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be given a unique identification number by the ad bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be reported by the ad banks
controls.control_description: Note: Suppliers' credit beyond 180 days and up to one year/three years from the date of shipment for non-capital/capital goods respectively, should also be reported by the AD banks.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be reported by the ad banks

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be reported by the ad banks as per the aforesaid procedure
controls.control_description: Further, permissions granted by the AD banks/Regional offices of Reserve Bank for settlement of delayed import dues in terms of paragraphs B.5 and C.2 of the Master Direction on Import of Goods and Services dated January 1, 2016, as amended from time to time, should also be reported by the AD banks as per the aforesaid procedure..
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be reported by the ad banks as per the aforesaid procedure

controls.control_objective: To ensure consider any document to satisfy themselves with the underlying tc arrangement
controls.control_description: As the Reserve Bank has not prescribed any format or manner in which TC arrangements / loan agreements are to be documented, ADs may consider any document to satisfy themselves with the underlying TC arrangement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consider any document to satisfy themselves with the underlying tc arrangement

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that there is no double financing on account of these transactions between a unit or a developer in a sez including ftwz for purchase of non-ca
controls.control_description: ADs should ensure that there is no double financing on account of these transactions between a unit or a developer in a SEZ including FTWZ for purchase of non-capital and capital goods within an SEZ including FTWZ or from a different SEZ including FTWZ.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that there is no double financing on account of these transactions between a unit or a developer in a sez including ftwz for purchase of non-ca

controls.control_objective: To ensure also ensure that for import of non-capital goods, the period of tc, as applicable, is lower of operating cycle or one year (three years for shipyards
controls.control_description: ADs should also ensure that for import of non-capital goods, the period of TC, as applicable, is lower of operating cycle or one year (three years for shipyards / shipbuilders).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also ensure that for import of non-capital goods, the period of tc, as applicable, is lower of operating cycle or one year (three years for shipyards

controls.control_objective: To ensure be more than the floating rate plus the applicable spread
controls.control_description: In the case of fixed rate loans, the swap cost plus spread should not be more than the floating rate plus the applicable spread.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be more than the floating rate plus the applicable spread

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed 4 per cent of the issue size and in case of private placement, these expenses should not exceed 2 per cent of the issue size, etc
controls.control_description: Additionally, for FCCBs, the issue related expenses should not exceed 4 per cent of the issue size and in case of private placement, these expenses should not exceed 2 per cent of the issue size, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed 4 per cent of the issue size and in case of private placement, these expenses should not exceed 2 per cent of the issue size, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure include rate of interest, other fees, expenses, charges, guarantee fees whether paid in foreign currency or inr
controls.control_description: Under TC Framework, all-in-cost shall include rate of interest, other fees, expenses, charges, guarantee fees whether paid in foreign currency or INR.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include rate of interest, other fees, expenses, charges, guarantee fees whether paid in foreign currency or inr

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a part of all-in-cost
controls.control_description: Withholding tax payable in INR shall not be a part of all-in-cost.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a part of all-in-cost

controls.control_objective: To ensure to send their requests to the reserve bank through their ad banks for examination
controls.control_description: Under the approval route, the prospective borrowers are required to send their requests to the Reserve Bank through their AD Banks for examination.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to send their requests to the reserve bank through their ad banks for examination

controls.control_objective: To ensure a person authorised as an authorised dealer under subsection (1) of section 10 of the fema, 1999 (42 of 1999)
controls.control_description: Authorised dealer: Means a person authorised as an authorised dealer under subsection (1) of section 10 of the FEMA, 1999 (42 of 1999).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a person authorised as an authorised dealer under subsection (1) of section 10 of the fema, 1999 (42 of 1999)

controls.control_objective: To ensure to follow the guidelines issued
controls.control_description: Further, other entities raising ECB are required to follow the guidelines issued, if any, by the concerned sectoral or prudential regulator.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to to follow the guidelines issued

controls.control_objective: To ensure only be considered for calculating the ratio
controls.control_description: Where there is more than one foreign equity holder in the borrowing company, the portion of the share premium in foreign currency brought in by the lender(s) concerned shall only be considered for calculating the ratio.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to only be considered for calculating the ratio

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a country identified in the public statement of the fatf as (i) a jurisdiction having a strategic anti-money laundering or combating the financing
controls.control_description: and should not be a country identified in the public statement of the FATF as (i) A jurisdiction having a strategic Anti-Money Laundering or Combating the Financing of Terrorism deficiencies to which counter measures apply;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a country identified in the public statement of the fatf as (i) a jurisdiction having a strategic anti-money laundering or combating the financing

controls.control_objective: To ensure also conform to other applicable regulations
controls.control_description: Issuance of FCCBs shall also conform to other applicable regulations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also conform to other applicable regulations

controls.control_objective: To ensure be without any warrants attached
controls.control_description: Further, FCCBs should be without any warrants attached.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be without any warrants attached

controls.control_objective: To ensure also conform to other applicable regulations
controls.control_description: Issuance of FCEBs shall also conform to other applicable regulations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also conform to other applicable regulations

controls.control_objective: To ensure (a) direct foreign equity holder with minimum 25% direct equity holding in the borrowing entity, (b) indirect equity holder with minimum indirect equi
controls.control_description: Foreign Equity Holder: It means (a) direct foreign equity holder with minimum 25% direct equity holding in the borrowing entity, (b) indirect equity holder with minimum indirect equity holding of 51%, or (c) group company with common overseas parent.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to (a) direct foreign equity holder with minimum 25% direct equity holding in the borrowing entity, (b) indirect equity holder with minimum indirect equi

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meanings as assigned to them in sections 2(v) of the fema, 1999
controls.control_description: Person Resident in India: It shall have the same meanings as assigned to them in Sections 2(v) of the FEMA, 1999.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meanings as assigned to them in sections 2(v) of the fema, 1999

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to them in special economic zones act 2005, as amended from time to time
controls.control_description: Special Economic Zone & Free Trade Warehousing Zone: They shall have the same meaning as assigned to them in Special Economic Zones Act 2005, as amended from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to them in special economic zones act 2005, as amended from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure conform to parameters such as minimum maturity, permitted and non-permitted end-uses, maximum all-in-cost ceiling, etc
controls.control_description: Introduction: External Commercial Borrowings are commercial loans raised by eligible resident entities from recognised non-resident entities and should conform to parameters such as minimum maturity, permitted and non-permitted end-uses, maximum all-in-cost ceiling, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to conform to parameters such as minimum maturity, permitted and non-permitted end-uses, maximum all-in-cost ceiling, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be resident of fatf or iosco compliant country, including on transfer of ecb
controls.control_description: The lender should be resident of FATF or IOSCO compliant country, including on transfer of ECB.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be resident of fatf or iosco compliant country, including on transfer of ecb

controls.control_objective: To ensure be exercisable prior to completion of minimum average maturity
controls.control_description: Call and put options, if any, shall not be exercisable prior to completion of minimum average maturity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be exercisable prior to completion of minimum average maturity

controls.control_objective: To ensure be available only to eligible borrowers of investment grade rating from indian credit rating agencies (cras)
controls.control_description: The enhanced all-in-cost ceiling shall be available only to eligible borrowers of investment grade rating from Indian Credit Rating Agencies (CRAs).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be available only to eligible borrowers of investment grade rating from indian credit rating agencies (cras)

controls.control_objective: To ensure raise ecb within the existing all-in-cost ceiling as hitherto
controls.control_description: Other eligible borrowers may raise ECB within the existing all-in-cost ceiling as hitherto.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to raise ecb within the existing all-in-cost ceiling as hitherto

controls.control_objective: To ensure be more than 2 per cent over and above the contracted rate of interest on the outstanding principal amount and will be outside the all-in-cost ceiling
controls.control_description: vii Other costs Prepayment charge/ Penal interest, if any, for default or breach of covenants, should not be more than 2 per cent over and above the contracted rate of interest on the outstanding principal amount and will be outside the all-in-cost ceiling.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be more than 2 per cent over and above the contracted rate of interest on the outstanding principal amount and will be outside the all-in-cost ceiling

controls.control_objective: To ensure be the rate prevailing on the date of settlement
controls.control_description: For conversion to Rupee, the exchange rate shall be the rate prevailing on the date of settlement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be the rate prevailing on the date of settlement

controls.control_objective: To ensure to follow the guidelines for hedging issued
controls.control_description:
x Hedging provision
The entities raising ECB are required to follow the guidelines for hedging issued, if any, by the concerned sectoral or prudential regulator in respect of foreign currency exposure.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to to follow the guidelines for hedging issued

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a board approved risk management policy
controls.control_description: Infrastructure space companies shall have a Board approved risk management policy.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to have a board approved risk management policy

controls.control_objective: To ensure to mandatorily hedge 70 per cent of their ecb exposure in case the average maturity of the ecb is less than 5 years
controls.control_description: Further, such companies are required to mandatorily hedge 70 per cent of their ECB exposure in case the average maturity of the ECB is less than 5 years.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to mandatorily hedge 70 per cent of their ecb exposure in case the average maturity of the ecb is less than 5 years

controls.control_objective: To ensure verify that 70 per cent hedging requirement is complied with during the currency of the ecb and report the position to rbi through form ecb 2
controls.control_description: The designated AD Category- I bank shall verify that 70 per cent hedging requirement is complied with during the currency of the ECB and report the position to RBI through Form ECB 2.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to verify that 70 per cent hedging requirement is complied with during the currency of the ecb and report the position to rbi through form ecb 2

controls.control_objective: To ensure be ensured: overseas investors are eligible to hedge their exposure in rupee through permitted derivative products with ad category i banks in india
controls.control_description:
The following operational aspects with respect to hedging should be ensured:
Overseas investors are eligible to hedge their exposure in Rupee through permitted derivative products with AD Category I banks in India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be ensured: overseas investors are eligible to hedge their exposure in rupee through permitted derivative products with ad category i banks in india

controls.control_objective: To ensure start from the time of each such exposure (i
controls.control_description: The financial hedge for all exposures on account of ECB should start from the time of each such exposure (i.e.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to start from the time of each such exposure (i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be considered naturally hedged if the offsetting exposure has the maturity/cash flow within the same accounting year
controls.control_description:
For this purpose, an ECB may be considered naturally
hedged if the offsetting exposure has the maturity/cash flow within the same accounting year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be considered naturally hedged if the offsetting exposure has the maturity/cash flow within the same accounting year

controls.control_objective: To ensure invest in fccbs/ fcebs in any manner whatsoever
controls.control_description: Further, financial intermediaries (viz., Indian banks, All India Financial Institutions, or NBFCs) shall not invest in FCCBs/ FCEBs in any manner whatsoever.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to invest in fccbs/ fcebs in any manner whatsoever

controls.control_objective: To ensure be repatriated immediately for credit to their rupee accounts with ad category i banks in india
controls.control_description: Parking of ECB proceeds domestically: ECB proceeds meant for Rupee expenditure should be repatriated immediately for credit to their Rupee accounts with AD Category I banks in India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be repatriated immediately for credit to their rupee accounts with ad category i banks in india

controls.control_objective: To ensure be kept in unencumbered position
controls.control_description: These term deposits should be kept in unencumbered position.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be kept in unencumbered position

controls.control_objective: To ensure approach the rbi with an application in prescribed format (form ecb) for examination through their ad category i bank
controls.control_description: For approval route cases, the borrowers may approach the RBI with an application in prescribed format (Form ECB) for examination through their AD Category I bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to approach the rbi with an application in prescribed format (form ecb) for examination through their ad category i bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be considered keeping in view the overall guidelines, macroeconomic situation and merits of the specific proposals
controls.control_description: Such cases shall be considered keeping in view the overall guidelines, macroeconomic situation and merits of the specific proposals.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be considered keeping in view the overall guidelines, macroeconomic situation and merits of the specific proposals

controls.control_objective: To ensure approach an ad category i bank with their proposal along with duly filled in form ecb
controls.control_description: Entities desirous to raise ECB under the automatic route may approach an AD Category I bank with their proposal along with duly filled in Form ECB.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to approach an ad category i bank with their proposal along with duly filled in form ecb

controls.control_objective: To ensure under the framework: 6
controls.control_description:
Reporting Requirements: Borrowings under ECB Framework are subject to following reporting requirements apart from any other specific reporting required under the framework:

6.1.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to under the framework: 6

controls.control_objective: To ensure happen only after obtaining the lrn from the reserve bank
controls.control_description: Loan Registration Number (LRN): Any draw-down in respect of an ECB should happen only after obtaining the LRN from the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to happen only after obtaining the lrn from the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure to submit duly certified form ecb, which also contains terms and conditions of the ecb, in duplicate to the designated ad category i bank
controls.control_description: To obtain the LRN, borrowers are required to submit duly certified Form ECB, which also contains terms and conditions of the ECB, in duplicate to the designated AD Category I bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to to submit duly certified form ecb, which also contains terms and conditions of the ecb, in duplicate to the designated ad category i bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported to the dsim through revised form ecb at the earliest, in any case not later than 7 days from the changes effected
controls.control_description: Changes in terms and conditions of ECB: Changes in ECB parameters in consonance with the ECB norms, including reduced repayment by mutual agreement between the lender and borrower, should be reported to the DSIM through revised Form ECB at the earliest, in any case not later than 7 days from the changes effected.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported to the dsim through revised form ecb at the earliest, in any case not later than 7 days from the changes effected

controls.control_objective: To ensure be specifically mentioned in the communication
controls.control_description: While submitting revised Form ECB the changes should be specifically mentioned in the communication.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be specifically mentioned in the communication

controls.control_objective: To ensure to report actual ecb transactions through form ecb 2 return through the ad category i bank on monthly basis so as to reach dsim within seven working d
controls.control_description: Monthly Reporting of actual transactions: The borrowers are required to report actual ECB transactions through Form ECB 2 Return through the AD Category I bank on monthly basis so as to reach DSIM within seven working days from the close of month to which it relates.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to to report actual ecb transactions through form ecb 2 return through the ad category i bank on monthly basis so as to reach dsim within seven working d

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be incorporated in form ecb 2 return
controls.control_description: Changes, if any, in ECB parameters should also be incorporated in Form ECB 2 Return.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be incorporated in form ecb 2 return

controls.control_objective: To ensure be retained by the lender in its books for recovery through judicial/ non-judicial means
controls.control_description: The outstanding amount will be treated as written-off from external debt liability of the country but may be retained by the lender in its books for recovery through judicial/ non-judicial means;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be retained by the lender in its books for recovery through judicial/ non-judicial means

controls.control_objective: To ensure be examined/processed by the ad bank
controls.control_description: b) No fresh ECB application by the entity should be examined/processed by the AD bank;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be examined/processed by the ad bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be informed whenever any entity is designated 'untraceable entity'
controls.control_description:
c) Directorate of Enforcement should be informed whenever any entity is designated 'UNTRACEABLE
ENTITY';
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be informed whenever any entity is designated 'untraceable entity'

controls.control_objective: To ensure directly approach dsim for cancellation of lrn for ecb contracted
controls.control_description: Cancellation of LRN: The designated AD Category I banks may directly approach DSIM for cancellation of LRN for ECB contracted, subject to ensuring that no draw down against the said LRN has taken place and the monthly ECB-2 returns till date in respect of the allotted LRN have been submitted to DSIM.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to directly approach dsim for cancellation of lrn for ecb contracted

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be permitted
controls.control_description: Further, refinancing of ECB raised under the previous ECB frameworks may also be permitted, subject to additionally ensuring that the borrower is eligible to raise ECB under the extant framework.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be permitted

controls.control_objective: To ensure be with the lender's consent and without any additional cost, should not result in contravention of eligibility and breach of applicable sector cap on
controls.control_description:
The conversion, which should be with the lender's consent and without any additional cost, should not result
in contravention of eligibility and breach of applicable sector cap on the foreign equity holding under FDI policy;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be with the lender's consent and without any additional cost, should not result in contravention of eligibility and breach of applicable sector cap on

controls.control_objective: To ensure be done with remarks "ecb fully converted to equity"
controls.control_description:
For full conversion, the entire portion is to be reported in Form FC-GPR, while reporting to DSIM in Form
ECB 2 Return should be done with remarks "ECB fully converted to equity".
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be done with remarks "ecb fully converted to equity"

controls.control_objective: To ensure be worked out with reference to the date of conversion only
controls.control_description: It may be noted that the fair value of the equity shares to be issued shall be worked out with reference to the date of conversion only.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be worked out with reference to the date of conversion only

controls.control_description:
Once the aforesaid stipulations are met, the AD Category I bank may permit creation of charge on immovable assets, movable assets, financial securities and issue of corporate and/or personal guarantees, during the currency of the ECB with security co-terminating with underlying ECB, subject to the following:
i.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to permit creation of charge on immovable assets, movable assets, financial securities and issue of corporate and/or personal guarantees, during the currency of the ecb with security co-terminating with underlying ecb

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to the following: a) such security shall be subject to provisions contained in the foreign exchange management (acquisition and transfer of
controls.control_description:
Creation of Charge on Immovable Assets: The arrangement shall be subject to the following:
a) Such security shall be subject to provisions contained in the Foreign Exchange Management
(Acquisition and Transfer of Immovable Property in India) Regulations, 2017, as amended from time to time.

controls.control_objective: To ensure be construed as a permission to acquire immovable asset (property) in india, by the overseas lender/ security trustee
controls.control_description:
b) The permission should not be construed as a permission to acquire immovable asset (property) in India,
by the overseas lender/ security trustee.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be construed as a permission to acquire immovable asset (property) in india, by the overseas lender/ security trustee

controls.control_objective: To ensure be repatriated to liquidate the outstanding ecb
controls.control_description:
c) In the event of enforcement / invocation of the charge, the immovable asset/ property will have to be
sold only to a person resident in India and the sale proceeds shall be repatriated to liquidate the outstanding ECB.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be repatriated to liquidate the outstanding ecb

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be taken out of the country subject to getting 'no objection certificate' from domestic lender/s
controls.control_description: Encumbered movable assets may also be taken out of the country subject to getting 'No Objection Certificate' from domestic lender/s, if any.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be taken out of the country subject to getting 'no objection certificate' from domestic lender/s

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted subject to the following: a) pledge of shares of the borrowing company held by the promoters as well as in domestic associate companies o
controls.control_description:
Creation of Charge over Financial Securities: The arrangements may be permitted subject to the following:
a) Pledge of shares of the borrowing company held by the promoters as well as in domestic associate
companies of the borrower is permitted.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted subject to the following: a) pledge of shares of the borrowing company held by the promoters as well as in domestic associate companies o

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in accordance with the extant fdi/fii policy including provisions relating to sectoral cap and pricing as applicable read with the foreign exchange
controls.control_description:
c) In case of invocation of pledge, transfer of financial securities shall be in accordance with the extant
FDI/FII policy including provisions relating to sectoral cap and pricing as applicable read with the
Foreign Exchange Management (Transfer or Issue of Security by a Person Resident outside India) Regulations, 2017, as amended from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be in accordance with the extant fdi/fii policy including provisions relating to sectoral cap and pricing as applicable read with the foreign exchange

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to the following: a) a copy of board resolution for the issue of corporate guarantee for the company issuing such guarantee, specifying nam
controls.control_description:
Issue of Corporate or Personal Guarantee: The arrangement shall be subject to the following:
a) A copy of Board Resolution for the issue of corporate guarantee for the company issuing such
guarantee, specifying name of the officials authorised to execute such guarantees on behalf of the company or in individual capacity should be obtained.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to the following: a) a copy of board resolution for the issue of corporate guarantee for the company issuing such guarantee, specifying nam

controls.control_objective: To ensure be obtained
controls.control_description:
b) Specific requests from individuals to issue personal guarantee indicating details of the ECB should be
obtained.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be obtained

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to provisions contained in the foreign exchange management (guarantees) regulations, 2026, as amended from time to time
controls.control_description:
c) Such security shall be subject to provisions contained in the Foreign Exchange Management
(Guarantees) Regulations, 2026, as amended from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to provisions contained in the foreign exchange management (guarantees) regulations, 2026, as amended from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that: i
controls.control_description:
Additional Requirements: While exercising the delegated powers, the AD Category I banks should ensure that:
i.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that: i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to applicable prudential guidelines issued by department of banking regulation of reserve bank including guidelines on restructuring
controls.control_description: It should also be ensured that if the ECB borrower has availed of credit facilities from the Indian banking system, including foreign branches/subsidiaries of Indian banks, any extension of tenure of ECB (whether matured or not) shall be subject to applicable prudential guidelines issued by Department of Banking Regulation of Reserve Bank including guidelines on restructuring.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be subject to applicable prudential guidelines issued by department of banking regulation of reserve bank including guidelines on restructuring

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported to the dsim as given at paragraph 6
controls.control_description:
The changes in the terms and conditions of ECB allowed by the ADs under the powers delegated and / or
changes approved by the Reserve Bank should be reported to the DSIM as given at paragraph 6.2 above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported to the dsim as given at paragraph 6

controls.control_objective: To ensure also get reflected in the form ecb 2 returns appropriately
controls.control_description: Further, these changes should also get reflected in the Form ECB 2 returns appropriately.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also get reflected in the form ecb 2 returns appropriately

controls.control_objective: To ensure be usd 10 billion or equivalent
controls.control_description: The overall ceiling for such ECB shall be USD 10 billion or equivalent.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be usd 10 billion or equivalent

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a board approved forex mark to market procedure and prudent risk management policy, for such ecb
controls.control_description: However, OMCs should have a Board approved forex mark to market procedure and prudent risk management policy, for such ECB.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to have a board approved forex mark to market procedure and prudent risk management policy, for such ecb

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a resident of a fatf compliant country
controls.control_description: Recognised lender: Lender / investor shall be a resident of a FATF compliant country.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a resident of a fatf compliant country

controls.control_objective: To ensure be denominated in any freely convertible currency or in indian rupees (inr) or a combination thereof
controls.control_description: Currency: The borrowing should be denominated in any freely convertible currency or in Indian Rupees (INR) or a combination thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be denominated in any freely convertible currency or in indian rupees (inr) or a combination thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure mobilise inr through swaps/outright sale undertaken through an ad category-i bank in india
controls.control_description: In case of borrowing in INR, the non-resident lender, should mobilise INR through swaps/outright sale undertaken through an AD Category-I bank in India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mobilise inr through swaps/outright sale undertaken through an ad category-i bank in india

controls.control_objective: To ensure be mutually agreed between the borrower and the lender
controls.control_description: All-in-cost: Shall be mutually agreed between the borrower and the lender.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be mutually agreed between the borrower and the lender

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with foreign direct investment / foreign portfolio investment / or any other norms applicable for foreign lenders / entities holding such secur
controls.control_description: and shall comply with foreign direct investment / foreign portfolio investment / or any other norms applicable for foreign lenders / entities holding such securities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with foreign direct investment / foreign portfolio investment / or any other norms applicable for foreign lenders / entities holding such secur

controls.control_objective: To ensure raise ecb as per the applicable norms
controls.control_description: Borrowing by Entities under Investigation: All entities against which investigation / adjudication / appeal by the law enforcing agencies for violation of any of the provisions of the Regulations under FEMA pending, may raise ECB as per the applicable norms, if they are otherwise eligible, notwithstanding the pending investigations / adjudications / appeals, without prejudice to the outcome of such investigations / adjudications / appeals.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to raise ecb as per the applicable norms

controls.control_objective: To ensure inform about pendency of such investigation / adjudication / appeal to the ad category-i bank / rbi as the case may be
controls.control_description: The borrowing entity shall inform about pendency of such investigation / adjudication / appeal to the AD Category-I bank / RBI as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to inform about pendency of such investigation / adjudication / appeal to the ad category-i bank / rbi as the case may be

controls.control_objective: To ensure intimate the agencies concerned by endorsing a copy of the approval letter
controls.control_description: Accordingly, in case of all applications where the borrowing entity has indicated about the pending investigations / adjudications / appeals, the AD Category I Banks / Reserve Bank while approving the proposal shall intimate the agencies concerned by endorsing a copy of the approval letter.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to intimate the agencies concerned by endorsing a copy of the approval letter

controls.control_objective: To ensure write to fedcoecbd@rbi
controls.control_description: For clarification required, if any, AD banks may write to fedcoecbd@rbi.org.in of the Reserve Bank and/ or may be communicated at Telephone No.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to write to fedcoecbd@rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure to meet the liability under the guarantee
controls.control_description: In cases where a Rupee facility which is either fund based or non-fund based (such as letter of credit / guarantee / letter of undertaking / letter of comfort) or is in the form of derivative contract by residents that are subsidiaries of multinational companies, is guaranteed by a non-resident (non-resident group entity in case of derivative contracts), there is no transaction involving foreign exchange until the guarantee is invoked and the non-resident guarantor is required to meet the liability under the guarantee.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to meet the liability under the guarantee

controls.control_objective: To ensure be with the following terms: i
controls.control_description:
The arrangements shall be with the following terms:
i.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be with the following terms: i

controls.control_objective: To ensure discharge the liability by i) payment out of rupee balances held in india or ii) by remitting the funds to india or iii) by debit to his fcnr(b)/nre a
controls.control_description: The non-resident guarantor may discharge the liability by i) payment out of rupee balances held in India or ii) by remitting the funds to India or iii) by debit to his FCNR(B)/NRE account maintained with an AD bank in India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to discharge the liability by i) payment out of rupee balances held in india or ii) by remitting the funds to india or iii) by debit to his fcnr(b)/nre a

controls.control_objective: To ensure enforce his claim against the resident borrower to recover the amount and on recovery he may seek repatriation of the amount if the liability is disch
controls.control_description: In such cases, the non-resident guarantor may enforce his claim against the resident borrower to recover the amount and on recovery he may seek repatriation of the amount if the liability is discharged either by inward remittance or by debit to FCNR(B)/NRE account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to enforce his claim against the resident borrower to recover the amount and on recovery he may seek repatriation of the amount if the liability is disch

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed the rupee equivalent of the amount paid by the non-resident guarantor against the invoked guarantee
controls.control_description: In cases where the liability is met by the non-resident out of funds remitted to India or by debit to his FCNR(B)/NRE account, the repayment may be made by credit to the FCNR(B)/NRE/NRO account of the guarantor provided, the amount remitted/credited shall not exceed the rupee equivalent of the amount paid by the non-resident guarantor against the invoked guarantee.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed the rupee equivalent of the amount paid by the non-resident guarantor against the invoked guarantee

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a minimum average maturity of three years
controls.control_description: The underlying debt instrument should have a minimum average maturity of three years;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a minimum average maturity of three years

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the eligibility criteria and prudential norms laid down in the circular dnbs
controls.control_description: NBFC-IFC proposing to avail of the credit enhancement facility should comply with the eligibility criteria and prudential norms laid down in the circular DNBS.PD.CC No.168/03.02.089/2009-10 dated February 12, 2010 and in case the novated loan is designated in foreign currency, the IFC should hedge the entire foreign currency exposure;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with the eligibility criteria and prudential norms laid down in the circular dnbs

controls.control_objective: To ensure 3, 2000 superseded vide fema 8(r)/2026-rb dated january 6, 2026
controls.control_description:
The reporting arrangements as applicable to the ECB would be applicable to the novated loans."

10 FEMA 8/2000-RB dated May 3, 2000 superseded vide FEMA 8(R)/2026-RB dated January 6, 2026.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to 3, 2000 superseded vide fema 8(r)/2026-rb dated january 6, 2026
